# DBUI Design System — LLM Context File
# Version: 2.0.0 | Updated: 2026-04-15
# Source: packages/dbui/ in github.com/muditmittal/dbui
#
# This file tells an LLM everything it needs to build UI with DBUI components.
# DBUI is Databricks' component library — shadcn/ui reskinned with DuBois design tokens.
# Stack: React 19, Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS v4, Base UI primitives.

## MANDATORY RULES

1. ALWAYS use DBUI components. NEVER create raw HTML elements (<button>, <input>, <div role="dialog">) when a DBUI component exists.
2. ALWAYS use DBUI icons from `dbui/components/icons/{Name}`. NEVER install third-party icon packages (lucide, heroicons, etc.).
3. ALWAYS use semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, border-border). NEVER hardcode hex colors.
4. ALWAYS import from `dbui/components/ui/{component}`. NEVER import from @radix-ui, @base-ui, or shadcn directly.
5. If a DBUI component doesn't exist for what you need, compose from existing DBUI primitives. If that's not possible, flag it — don't build a one-off.

## COMPONENT INDEX

### When to use what

| User intent | Use this | NOT this |
|-------------|----------|----------|
| Trigger an action | `Button` | raw `<button>` |
| Toggle a state on/off | `Toggle` (with icon) or `Switch` (settings) | checkbox for on/off |
| Switch between views | `Tabs` (content panels) or `SegmentControl` (toolbar filters) | radio group |
| Choose one from a list | `Select` (<15 options) or `Combobox` (>15, needs search) | native `<select>` |
| Choose multiple | `Combobox` (multi mode) or checkboxes in a `DropdownMenu` | multi-select HTML |
| Multi-value tags | `TypeaheadCombobox` (ComboboxChips) | custom chip input |
| Confirm destructive action | `AlertDialog` | `Dialog` with red button |
| Show focused task | `Dialog` | full page navigation |
| Show secondary content | `Drawer` (slides from right) | Dialog for detail panels |
| Show context actions | `DropdownMenu` (click) or right-click `ContextMenu` | custom popover with buttons |
| Show additional info on hover | `Tooltip` (text only) or `HoverCard` (rich content) | title attribute |
| Show rich interactive content | `Popover` | Tooltip with forms |
| Persistent inline message | `Alert` (info/warning/danger/success) | Toast for persistent messages |
| Transient feedback | `toast()` via sonner | Alert for temporary messages |
| Loading placeholder | `Skeleton` (known shape) or `Spinner` (indeterminate) | custom loading div |
| Navigate product areas | `Navbar` + `NavbarItem` (sidebar) | custom nav links |
| Show hierarchical path | `Breadcrumb` | slash-separated text |
| Paginate data | `Pagination` | custom page buttons |
| Display structured data | `Table` with typed cells | raw HTML table |
| Tag/filter chip | `Tag` (removable) or `Badge` (read-only status) | custom pill div |
| Metadata display | `KeyValuePair` | description list or custom grid |
| Empty state | `Empty` (title + description + action) | custom centered text |

### Component imports

```
dbui/components/ui/button          → Button, ButtonIcon, ButtonChevron
dbui/components/ui/toggle          → Toggle
dbui/components/ui/segment-control → SegmentControl, SegmentControlItem
dbui/components/ui/split-button    → SplitButton, SplitButtonSeparator
dbui/components/ui/input           → Input
dbui/components/ui/textarea        → Textarea
dbui/components/ui/select          → Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, SelectLabel
dbui/components/ui/combobox        → Combobox, ComboboxInput, ComboboxContent, ComboboxList, ComboboxItem, ComboboxLabel, ComboboxChips, ComboboxChip, ComboboxClear
dbui/components/ui/dropdown-menu   → DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuRadioItem, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuShortcut, DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuSubContent, DropdownMenuItemIcon, DropdownMenuItemDescription, DropdownMenuItemBadge, DropdownMenuSearch, DropdownMenuEmpty, DropdownMenuLoading, DropdownMenuFooter, DropdownMenuGroup
dbui/components/ui/checkbox        → Checkbox
dbui/components/ui/radio-group     → RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem
dbui/components/ui/radio-tile      → RadioTile, RadioTileGroup
dbui/components/ui/switch          → Switch
dbui/components/ui/slider          → Slider
dbui/components/ui/label           → Label
dbui/components/ui/dialog          → Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose
dbui/components/ui/alert-dialog    → AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel
dbui/components/ui/alert           → Alert, AlertIcon, AlertContent, AlertTitle, AlertDescription, AlertAction, AlertClose
dbui/components/ui/sonner          → Toaster (provider) — use `import { toast } from "sonner"` for imperative
dbui/components/ui/popover         → Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent
dbui/components/ui/tooltip         → Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent
dbui/components/ui/hover-card      → HoverCard, HoverCardTrigger, HoverCardContent
dbui/components/ui/drawer          → Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription
dbui/components/ui/tabs            → Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent
dbui/components/ui/table           → Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCellIcon, TableCellTitle, TableCellMeta, TableCellStatus
dbui/components/ui/card            → Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter
dbui/components/ui/avatar          → Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback
dbui/components/ui/badge           → Badge
dbui/components/ui/tag             → Tag, TagIcon, TagLabel, TagValue, TagRemove
dbui/components/ui/breadcrumb      → Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbPage
dbui/components/ui/pagination      → Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext
dbui/components/ui/accordion       → Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent
dbui/components/ui/navbar          → Navbar, NavbarSection, NavbarSectionHeader, NavbarItem, NavbarItemIcon
dbui/components/ui/separator       → Separator
dbui/components/ui/skeleton        → Skeleton
dbui/components/ui/spinner         → Spinner
dbui/components/ui/progress        → Progress
dbui/components/ui/empty           → Empty
dbui/components/ui/status          → Status
dbui/components/ui/key-value-pair  → KeyValuePair, KeyValueRow, KeyValueKey, KeyValueValue
dbui/components/ui/input-group     → InputGroup, InputGroupInput, InputGroupButton, InputGroupAddon
dbui/components/ui/editor-tabs     → EditorTabs, EditorTab
dbui/components/icons/{Name}       → 451 icons, 16×16 default. See icon search section below.
dbui/tokens/globals.css            → All design tokens (import in root CSS)
```

## COMPOSITION RECIPES

### Recipe: Full product page

Every Databricks page uses the Platform Shell. Content goes inside the white surface.

```tsx
<div className="flex h-screen flex-col overflow-hidden bg-muted">
  {/* Platform Header — 48px, fixed */}
  <header className="flex h-12 shrink-0 items-center px-3 bg-muted">...</header>

  {/* Page area — sidebar + content */}
  <div className="flex flex-1 min-h-0 px-2 pb-2 gap-2">
    {/* Sidebar — 180px, fixed, scrolls independently */}
    <nav className="w-[180px] shrink-0 overflow-y-auto">
      <Navbar>
        <NavbarItem active><NavbarItemIcon><Data /></NavbarItemIcon>Catalog</NavbarItem>
        ...
      </Navbar>
    </nav>

    {/* Content surface — the ONLY scrollable area */}
    <main className="flex-1 min-w-0 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background border border-border rounded-lg">
      {/* Breadcrumb → Title row → Tabs → Content */}
    </main>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Recipe: List page (inside content surface)

```tsx
{/* Breadcrumb */}
<div className="px-6 pt-4"><Breadcrumb>...</Breadcrumb></div>

{/* Page title + actions */}
<div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3">
  <h1 className="text-[22px] font-semibold">Page Title</h1>
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <Button variant="outline">Share</Button>
    <Button>Create</Button>
  </div>
</div>

{/* Tabs */}
<div className="px-6">
  <Tabs defaultValue="all">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="all">All</TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="mine">Mine</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</div>

{/* Control bar */}
<div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3">
  <Input placeholder="Filter..." className="w-[240px]" />
  <Toggle variant="filter">Status</Toggle>
  <Toggle variant="filter">Type</Toggle>
</div>

{/* Table */}
<div className="px-6">
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow><TableHead>Name</TableHead><TableHead>Status</TableHead></TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow><TableCell>Item</TableCell><TableCell><Status status="success" label="Running" /></TableCell></TableRow>
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
</div>

{/* Pagination */}
<div className="px-6 py-4"><Pagination>...</Pagination></div>
```

### Recipe: Form in a dialog

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Create Connection</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>New Connection</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Connect to an external data source.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>

    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 py-4">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
        <Label htmlFor="name">Connection name</Label>
        <Input id="name" placeholder="my-connection" />
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
        <Label htmlFor="type">Connection type</Label>
        <Select>
          <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Select type..." /></SelectTrigger>
          <SelectContent>
            <SelectItem value="postgres">PostgreSQL</SelectItem>
            <SelectItem value="mysql">MySQL</SelectItem>
          </SelectContent>
        </Select>
      </div>
    </div>

    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      <Button>Create</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Recipe: Dropdown menu with all features

```tsx
<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Actions<ButtonChevron /></Button>
  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent align="start">
    {/* Icon items */}
    <DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Pencil /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
      Edit
      <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘E</DropdownMenuShortcut>
    </DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Copy /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
      Duplicate
    </DropdownMenuItem>

    {/* Grouped section */}
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuGroup>
      <DropdownMenuLabel>Move to</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuItem>Workspace</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem>Archive</DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuGroup>

    {/* Destructive — always last, always separated */}
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">
      <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Trash /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
      Delete
    </DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

### Recipe: Adding a new menu item to an existing menu

When adding a feature that starts with a menu item:
1. Find the existing `<DropdownMenuContent>` in the target component
2. Add a `<DropdownMenuItem>` with appropriate icon from DBUI icons
3. If the item opens a dialog/drawer, wrap the menu in the overlay's root and use the item as trigger:

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild><Button variant="outline">Options</Button></DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent>
      <DropdownMenuItem>Existing action</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DialogTrigger asChild>
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Plus /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
          New Connection...
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DialogTrigger>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
  <DialogContent>
    {/* Dialog content here */}
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Recipe: Detail page with sidebar

```tsx
<div className="flex gap-6 px-6 py-4">
  {/* Main content */}
  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-4">
    <Card>
      <CardHeader><CardTitle>Overview</CardTitle></CardHeader>
      <CardContent>...</CardContent>
    </Card>
    <Card>
      <CardHeader><CardTitle>History</CardTitle></CardHeader>
      <CardContent><Table>...</Table></CardContent>
    </Card>
  </div>

  {/* Detail sidebar */}
  <aside className="w-[320px] shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-6">
    <KeyValuePair>
      <KeyValueRow><KeyValueKey>Owner</KeyValueKey><KeyValueValue>user@databricks.com</KeyValueValue></KeyValueRow>
      <KeyValueRow><KeyValueKey>Created</KeyValueKey><KeyValueValue>2026-04-15</KeyValueValue></KeyValueRow>
      <KeyValueRow><KeyValueKey>Type</KeyValueKey><KeyValueValue><Badge variant="outline">Table</Badge></KeyValueValue></KeyValueRow>
    </KeyValuePair>
    <Separator />
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <Label>Tags</Label>
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
        <Tag><TagLabel>env</TagLabel><TagValue>prod</TagValue><TagRemove /></Tag>
        <Tag><TagLabel>team</TagLabel><TagValue>data-eng</TagValue><TagRemove /></Tag>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>
</div>
```

## NESTED COMPONENT MAPPING

These are the inner components that compose larger ones. Know these to assemble correctly.

### Button anatomy
```
<Button>
  <ButtonIcon>{icon}</ButtonIcon>     ← optional leading icon
  Label text                          ← required
  <ButtonChevron />                   ← optional trailing chevron (menu trigger)
</Button>
```
Variants: default (primary), outline, secondary, ghost, link, destructive, danger
Sizes: sm (24px), md (32px), icon-sm (24px square), icon-md (32px square)

### Menu item anatomy
```
<DropdownMenuItem>
  <DropdownMenuItemIcon>{icon}</DropdownMenuItemIcon>  ← optional, but if one item has it, ALL must
  Label text                                            ← required
  <DropdownMenuItemDescription>Secondary</...>          ← optional subtitle
  <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘K</...>                        ← optional trailing shortcut
  <DropdownMenuItemBadge>3</...>                        ← optional trailing count
</DropdownMenuItem>
```
Menu row types: Item, CheckboxItem, RadioItem, SubTrigger, Label (section header), Separator, Search, Empty, Loading, Footer

### Alert anatomy
```
<Alert variant="warning">
  <AlertIcon><WarningFill /></AlertIcon>    ← required (provides severity beyond color)
  <AlertContent>
    <AlertTitle>Title</AlertTitle>          ← required
    <AlertDescription>Details</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction><Button>Fix</Button></AlertAction>  ← optional (stacked layout)
  </AlertContent>
  <AlertAction><Button>Fix</Button></AlertAction>    ← optional (inline layout)
  <AlertClose />                                      ← optional (omit for critical)
</Alert>
```

### Table cell types
```
<TableCell>Plain text</TableCell>
<TableCell><TableCellTitle><TableCellIcon>{icon}</TableCellIcon><TableCellTitleContent><span>Name</span><TableCellMeta>metadata</TableCellMeta></TableCellTitleContent></TableCellTitle></TableCell>
<TableCell><TableCellStatus><TableCellIcon><Status /></TableCellIcon>Running</TableCellStatus></TableCell>
<TableCell><TableCellUser><Avatar /><span>user@example.com</span></TableCellUser></TableCell>
```

### Form field pattern
```
<div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
  <Label htmlFor="id">Field name</Label>
  <Input id="id" placeholder="..." />           ← or Select, Combobox, Textarea
  <span className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground">Helper text</span>
</div>
```
Spacing: Label → Input = gap-1.5 (6px). Field → Field = gap-4 (16px).

### Nav item pattern
```
<NavbarItem active={isActive} onClick={handleClick}>
  <NavbarItemIcon><Data /></NavbarItemIcon>    ← required — sidebar is icon-first
  Catalog
</NavbarItem>
```

## ICON SEARCH

451 icons with semantic tags. Each icon has: `/** use:<category> <concept> | <synonyms> */`

**Categories:**
- `use:object` — Databricks product concepts (nav items, table cells, cards)
- `use:action` — Verbs (buttons, toolbar actions, menu items)
- `use:indicator` — Status/state (badges, alerts, status cells)
- `use:component` — Control chrome only (chevrons, checks, close — don't use outside their control)

**How to find icons:**
```bash
grep "use:object Experiment" packages/dbui/src/components/icons/     # by concept
grep "flask\|lab" packages/dbui/src/components/icons/                 # by synonym
grep "use:action delete" packages/dbui/src/components/icons/          # by action
```

**Common mappings (frequently confused):**
| Concept | Icon | Why |
|---------|------|-----|
| Experiments | Beaker | flask/lab metaphor |
| Jobs/Lakeflow | Workflows | DAG metaphor |
| Compute | Cloud | cloud resource |
| Unity Catalog | Data | data/catalog metaphor |
| Genie | SparkleRectangle | AI sparkle |
| SQL Warehouses | CloudDatabase | cloud DB |
| Marketplace | Storefront | shop metaphor |

## COMPOSITION RULES

### Buttons
- Link variant: NO icons (only exception: trailing NewWindow for external links)
- Ghost buttons: prefer icon-only. Ghost + icon + label competes with Outline.
- Menu triggers: outline or secondary, never primary. The chevron is the affordance.
- Max one Primary button per visible area.

### Menus
- Popup left-aligns with trigger (`align="start"`)
- If one item has an icon, ALL items in that group must have icons
- Destructive items: always last, always preceded by separator
- Section headers use `<DropdownMenuLabel>` inside `<DropdownMenuGroup>`

### Dialogs
- Primary action rightmost in footer. Cancel left, confirm right.
- Non-alert dialogs must have a close button (top-right)
- Max one dialog open at a time — never stack
- For simple confirmations, use AlertDialog (can't be dismissed by overlay click)

### Forms
- Select for <15 options. Combobox for 15+.
- Label uses Bold style (13px Semibold). Helper text uses Hint (12px Regular muted).
- Error message replaces helper text, never stacks below it.
- Validation is border-only — no ring shadows on inputs.

### Navigation
- Every NavbarItem MUST have an icon (sidebar is icon-first)
- Active item: bg-accent + text-accent-foreground + font-semibold
- Section headers: 12px Regular muted-foreground with collapse chevron

### Tables
- Sort indicator visible on sortable columns even when unsorted
- Row hover: bg-muted/50
- Header: font-semibold. Body: font-normal.

### Layout
- Page padding: px-6 py-4 inside content surface
- Section gaps: gap-4 between distinct sections. gap-2 within a component.
- Shell bg is bg-muted (grey). Content surface is bg-background (white) with border and rounded-lg.

## SPACING QUICK REFERENCE

| Gap | Value | Use |
|-----|-------|-----|
| gap-1 (4px) | Inside controls (icon↔label in small buttons) |
| gap-1.5 (6px) | Label to input |
| gap-2 (8px) | Within a component (icon↔text, related items) |
| gap-4 (16px) | Between sections, between form fields |
| gap-6 (24px) | Between major content blocks, sidebar sections |

## TYPOGRAPHY QUICK REFERENCE

| Use | Style |
|-----|-------|
| Body text, input values | 13px/20px Regular (text-[13px] leading-[20px]) |
| Labels, emphasis | 13px/20px Semibold (font-semibold) |
| Captions, helper text | 12px/16px Regular (text-[12px] leading-[16px]) |
| Section headings | 18px/24px Semibold SF Pro Display |
| Page titles | 22px/28px Semibold SF Pro Display |
| Code | 13px/20px SF Mono |

## TOKEN FILE

Import `dbui/tokens/globals.css` in your root CSS. This provides all semantic color, radius, spacing, and shadow tokens. Token values are documented in the component files and the Storybook at dbuidesign.vercel.app.
